'''Urur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]]<ref name="Premiere" /> who lived on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Databank" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="timeline">The [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of the ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'' is centered around the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]].</ref> He was the younger brother of the Tusken Raider [[Ur]]. Urur was restricted to defending his [[Ur's tribe|tribe]]. If Ur was [[Death/Legends|killed]], Urur would take his older brother's place. Urur wore desert-[[Color/Legends|colored]] robes, with two [[Bandolier/Legends|bandoliers]] strapped diagonally across both sides of the chest above the [[Belt/Legends|belt]], along with the standard Tusken mask. He wielded a [[Gaderffii/Legends|Gaderffii]].<ref name="Premiere" />

==Behind the scenes==
Urur was mentioned on a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="Premiere" />
